data.title: Binance will add watch tags for BIFI, FIS, KMD, and MDT
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance announced that it will add observation tags to Beefy (BIFI), StaFi (FIS), Komodo (KMD) and Measurable Data Token (MDT) on June 5, 2025.
Observation tag tokens may have higher volatility and risk than other listed tokens. Binance will closely monitor and continue to review.
Please be aware that trading these tokens with observation tags is risky. These tokens no longer meet the standards when they were listed on the Binance platform and may be delisted.

data.title: Jack Dorsey Engages with Elon Musk's Bitcoin Commentary
data.description: According to Foresight News, Twitter founder Jack Dorsey recently interacted with an old tweet from Elon Musk, where Musk stated, "Bitcoin is my safe word." Dorsey responded to the tweet by simply commenting, "Bitcoin."

data.title: El Salvador and U.S. Discuss Bitcoin and Digital Asset Collaboration
data.description: According to PANews, El Salvador's President Nayib Bukele met with Bo Hines, the Executive Director of the U.S. President Donald Trump's Digital Asset Advisory Board, on the afternoon of June 5. The meeting focused on cooperation in the fields of Bitcoin and digital assets. Bo Hines expressed a commitment to jointly shaping the future of global finance and praised President Bukele for the transformative developments he has initiated in El Salvador.

data.title: Standard Chartered says corporate demand for Bitcoin is about to make it crash
data.description:
Corporate wallets are filling up with Bitcoin, and Standard Chartered thinks that could soon blow up in everyone’s face. In a new report released yesterday, the bank said businesses that recently joined the crypto frenzy are loading up at high prices—and if the market takes a hit, they might dump their coins fast. That’s not […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/stanchart-corporate-demand-bitcoin-crash/

data.title: The project team linked its multi-signature wallet to transfer a total of 17 million ENA to multiple CEXs through Flowdesk, which may be part of the token unlocking.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Spot On Chain monitoring, about an hour ago, a multi-signature address associated with the Ethena project recharged 17 million ENA to the three major exchanges Binance, Gate and Bybit through Flowdesk, worth about US$5.68 million.
On-chain information shows that this batch of tokens was released from the @ethena_labs smart contract three days ago, or it is part of the 171.88 million ENA (accounting for 2.82% of the circulating supply, with a total value of about US$54.56 million) planned to be unlocked today.

data.title: French Suspect in Cryptocurrency Kidnapping Cases Arrested in Morocco
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a man accused of being one of the masterminds behind a series of recent cryptocurrency-related kidnappings in France has been arrested in Morocco. The arrest was made by Moroccan national police and intelligence services at the request of French authorities.

The suspect, identified as 24-year-old French-Moroccan national Badiss Mohamed Amide Bajjou, was found in possession of several knives and multiple mobile phones at the time of his arrest. The operation highlights ongoing international cooperation in tackling cybercrime and related offenses.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Unveils Conservative Treasury Strategy Amid Major R&D Restructuring
data.description:
The combined announcements represent perhaps the most significant organizational evolution in the Ethereum Foundation's history, establishing both financial discipline and operational focus as the protocol approaches mainstream adoption.
source: https://www.blockhead.co/2025/06/05/ethereum-foundation-unveils-conservative-treasury-strategy-amid-major-r-d-restructuring/

data.title: Crypto.com sues Nevada gaming body over block on sports event contracts
data.description:
The crypto exchange claims it is fully regulated, and the CFTC has jurisdiction over its sports contracts, not the state of Nevada.

data.title: Whales redeemed and transferred 526,000 LPT to Binance, earning about $2.01 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Ember Detection, an address redeemed 526,000 LPT (about $4.81 million) from the PoS staking contract of Livepeer (LPT) in the past hour, and has transferred the batch of tokens to the Binance exchange.
On-chain data shows that these LPT tokens were previously withdrawn and staked from Binance at an average price of about $5.9 from February to April. The price of LPT has continued to rise recently, and has accumulated an increase of more than 55% in the past week. This operation is expected to realize a profit of about $2.01 million, which is suspected to be a whale or institution choosing to stop profit shipment.

data.title: Digital Asset Treasuries Emerge as New Investment Tools
data.description: According to PANews, Pantera Capital's managing partner, Paul Veradittakit, recently highlighted the emergence of Digital Asset Treasuries (DATs) as innovative investment tools beyond traditional crypto ETFs. Companies like DeFi Development Corp (DFDV) and SharpLink Gaming (SBET) are adopting this approach by incorporating cryptocurrencies into their balance sheets. DFDV focuses on accumulating Solana, while SBET uses Ethereum as its primary reserve asset. This strategy offers investors indirect exposure to cryptocurrencies. Unlike ETFs, DATs are not compelled to sell assets due to redemptions or regulatory demands and can enhance returns through staking. Pantera Capital believes that these DATs provide unique exposure to cryptocurrencies and contribute to the growth of the crypto ecosystem.

data.title: Solo Bitcoin miner earns $330K reward by solving block
data.description:
5-6-2025 – A solo Bitcoin miner has successfully solved a cryptographic puzzle and secured a new block on the blockchain, according to data shared by Onchain Lens. The miner earned 3. 151 BTC, currently valued at approximately $330,000, for their efforts.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/solo-bitcoin-miner-earns-330k-reward-by-solving-block/

data.title: Cipher Mining Reports May Bitcoin Production and Expansion Plans
data.description:
According to PANews, Cipher Mining (NASDAQ: CIFR) has released its operational data for May. The company produced approximately 179 bitcoins during the month, which includes around 4 bitcoins equivalent from power sales and about 23 bitcoins from a joint venture data center. Cipher Mining sold 64 bitcoins in May, ending the month with a total holding of 966 bitcoins, of which approximately 334 are used as collateral.

By the end of May, Cipher Mining had deployed 75,000 mining machines, achieving an operational hash rate of 13.5 EH/s with a machine efficiency of 18.9 J/TH. The company is advancing the construction of its Black Pearl data center in Texas, with the first phase nearing completion. Old mining machines from the Odessa upgrade project have been relocated and installed, awaiting power connection. Cipher Mining has purchased the remaining machines to fill the first phase's 150 MW power capacity at Black Pearl, with new machines expected to arrive and be deployed by early July. Once deployment is complete, the company's projected hash rate is expected to increase from the current 13.5 EH/s to approximately 23.1 EH/s.

data.title: Sunrise Secures $3 Million Seed Funding to Enhance Interoperability Protocol
data.description: According to Odaily, Sunrise, a decentralized application (DA) interoperability protocol, has successfully raised $3 million in a seed funding round. The investment was led by Decima, with participation from Animoca Brands Japan, Hyperithm, Cogitent Ventures, MZ Web3 Fund, V3V Ventures, Connectico Capital, and MH Ventures. The newly acquired funds are intended to support the integration of data availability layers and liquidity center functionalities into a unified platform backed by Proof-of-Liquidity. This initiative aims to facilitate liquidity sharing across the platform.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of US$56.978 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 13 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (June 4, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$56.978 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of US$73.1835 million. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached US$4.804 billion.
The second is Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH, with a single-day net inflow of US$7.4194 million, and the current total net inflow of ETH has reached US$685 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net outflow of US$23.6248 million. Currently, FETH's total net inflow has reached US$1.539 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is US$9.877 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.14%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$3.290 billion.

data.title: U.S. Ethereum Spot ETF Sees Significant Inflow
data.description: According to BlockBeats, monitoring data from Farside indicates that the U.S. Ethereum spot ETF experienced a net inflow of $57 million yesterday.

data.title: Crypto wearable leader CUDIS holds pre-TGE special Space
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the leading crypto wearable project CUDIS will hold a pre-TGE special Space at 12:00 today, hosted by CUDIS founder Edison. Topics include token economics, Season 1 review, Season 2 trailer, future roadmap, etc.
Previous news, Binance Wallet exclusive TGE will launch CUDIS, the subscription time is from 4 to 6 pm on June 5, 2025 (UTC+8), and eligible users must use Binance Alpha points to participate.

data.title: BitMine Completes $18 Million Financing Through Stock Offering, Net Proceeds to Be Used to Purchase Bitcoin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin mining company BitMine Immersion Technologies (NYSE American: BMNR) announced the completion of a public offering of 2.25 million shares, priced at $8 per share, raising a total of $18 million. The company plans to use the net proceeds to directly purchase Bitcoin.
At the same time, BitMine shares have been approved for listing on the NYSE American exchange on June 5, with the stock code "BMNR", and the original OTCQX market trading will be terminated simultaneously. (GlobeNewswire)
